en.extract:
The three-striped hemispingus (Microspingus trifasciatus) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae.
It is found in Bolivia and Peru. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''three-striped hemispingus''' ('''''Microspingus trifasciatus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Tanager|Thraupidae]].

It is found in [[Bolivia]] and [[Peru]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
[[File:MicrospingusTrifasciatusKeulemans.jpg|thumb|left|200px]]
